nasb.text: But Moses said to the Lord, “Then the Egyptians will hear of it, for by Your strength You brought up this people from their midst,

esv.text: But Moses said to the Lord, “Then the Egyptians will hear of it, for you brought up this people in your might from among them,

cnv.text: 摩西對耶和華說：“這樣埃及人必聽見這事，因為你曾用大能，把這民從他們中間領上來；

ccb.text: 摩西对耶和华说：“你曾经用大能把以色列人从埃及领出来，埃及人听说这事后，
